Bug / Task Description: HybridLogicalClock.Witness in pkg/clock/hlc.go merges a remote HLC timestamp into the local clock. When the chosen wall time equals BOTH the local last wall time and the remote wall time, the resulting logical counter must advance past the larger of the two logical counters; currently it advances past only the local counter, so witnessing a remote event with a higher logical counter at the same wall time yields a timestamp that does not strictly succeed the remote one. Restore strict, causally-consistent monotonic ordering.
Commit Subject: fix(clock): correct HLC logical counter when wall times tie
